budget.policy: Use this packet first. Expand only listed specs/code/evidence when phase or stale revision requires exact source.

task.title: Add automatic fresh-context verifier agent workflow
task.summary: Design and implement an automatic verifier stage that spawns a read-only agent when task execution reaches verification, while retaining a manual command only as an override/debug entrypoint.

goal.outcome: CodeWiki automatically verifies task completion through a separate read-only Pi agent as part of the inner loop before closure.
acceptance: Inner loop invokes verifier automatically when a task is ready for closure or explicit verification evidence is missing.
Verifier stage accepts a task id internally and builds a compact verification brief from task context, linked specs, diff/status, and acceptance criteria.
Verifier runs in a separate Pi process or SDK/RPC session with read-only tools plus allowed check commands.
Verifier returns deterministic JSON verdict with pass/fail/block, checks, issues, and rationale.
Parent CodeWiki flow appends verifier output as task evidence without automatically mutating code.
Auto-close is gated by verifier pass plus local checks plus no unresolved issues and user/project policy.
Manual `/wiki-verify` or equivalent, if present, is a debug/override entrypoint rather than the primary workflow.
non_goals: Replace human review for security-sensitive or product-sensitive changes.
Require verifier for every tiny docs typo when policy says skip.
verification: Create tests or smoke scripts for verifier trigger selection, brief generation, and verdict parsing.
Manual smoke: run automatic verifier stage against a known passing and known failing task fixture.
Confirm verifier cannot write files or mutate roadmap directly.

delta.desired: Task closure automatically uses independent fresh-context verification rather than relying on users to trigger a command.
delta.current: Skill guidance recommends fresh verification, but no automatic verifier stage exists.
delta.closure: Add automatic verifier stage, verifier prompt/protocol, evidence append path, and optional manual override.

specs.title: Clients Overview
specs.summary: User-facing workflow and status-surface expectations for codewiki.

specs.title: Runtime Policy
specs.summary: Policy boundary for codewiki runtime access in codewiki.

evidence.summary: Implemented automatic fresh verifier stage for explicit task close: builds compact verifier prompt from task/context, spawns read-only `pi --mode json --no-session` with read/grep/find/ls tools, parses deterministic JSON verdict, appends verifier evidence, and blocks closure on non-pass; smoke tests disable nested verifier via env.
issues: Automatic verifier currently runs on explicit `codewiki_task` close; lifecycle `update` pass path remains a follow-up if strict auto-verify is required there too.
